document.title: CB Test Certificate for Abyz Digital Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: IECEE CB Test Certificate NO114217 for H&abyz ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports evidence that a sample of the Abyz Digital Detector model ADD was tested and found in conformity with listed IEC 60601 standards under the IECEE CB Scheme.
keyPoints: Product is identified as Abyz Digital Detector.
Applicant, manufacturer, and factory are H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Korea.
The certificate states conformity with IEC 60601-1 and IEC 60601-1-6 editions and amendments.
The certificate states all applicable clauses of IEC 62366:2007+AMD1:2014 have been addressed.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Name and address of the applicant... H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the manufacturer... H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the factory... H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: IECEE CB Scheme
entities.evidence: IEC SYSTEM FOR MUTUAL RECOGNITION OF TEST CERTIFICATES FOR ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT (IECEE) CB SCHEME

entities.name: National Certification Body
entities.evidence: This CB Test Certificate is issued by the National Certification Body

entities.name: Jiyea Gim
entities.evidence: Date: 29-09-2020 Signature: Jiyea Gim Certification Department

concepts.name: ADD

evidence.claim: The certificate reference number is NO114217.
The product covered by the certificate is the Abyz Digital Detector.
The model or type reference is ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: Model / Type Ref. Ref. De type ADD

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is listed as applicant, manufacturer, and factory.
evidence.evidenceText: Name and address of the applicant... H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the manufacturer... H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Name and address of the factory... H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: A sample was tested and found in conformity with IEC 60601-1:2005 and IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012.
evidence.evidenceText: A sample of the product was tested and found to be in conformity with IEC 60601-1:2005, IEC 60601-1:2005/AMD1:2012

evidence.claim: A sample was tested and found in conformity with IEC 60601-1-6:2010 and IEC 60601-1-6:2010/AMD1:2013.
Applicable clauses of IEC 62366:2007+AMD1:2014 were addressed.
evidence.evidenceText: In addition, all applicable clauses of IEC 62366:2007+AMD1:2014 have been addressed.

evidence.claim: The test report reference number is 397950.
evidence.evidenceText: As shown in the Test Report Ref. No. which forms part of this Certificate... 397950

evidence.claim: The digital flat panel X-ray detector rating is 3 A, 16 Vdc or internally powered 11.1 Vdc, 3400 mAh.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector: 3 A, 16 Vdc or Internally powered (11.1 Vdc, 3400 mAh)

evidence.claim: The power supply box input and output ratings are specified in the certificate.
evidence.evidenceText: Power supply box: (Input) 1.0 A, 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, Cl. I or 3 A, 24 Vdc, (Output) 3 A, 16 Vdc

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text identifies an IECEE CB Scheme certificate rather than an FDA document.
The issuing National Certification Body name is not explicitly present in the extracted text; only an address in Lysaker, Norway is shown.
No revision or version number is present in the source text.
OCR/text extraction contains minor artifacts in bilingual headings, but key certificate facts are readable.
